inputs.label: Invoice Net Amount
inputs.businessContext: Net amount on the supplier's invoice in foreign currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net amount on the supplier's invoice in foreign currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçi faturasındaki yabancı para cinsinden net tutar.

inputs.label: Exchange Rate
inputs.businessContext: Exchange rate to convert foreign currency to local currency for VAT calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Exchange rate to convert foreign currency to local currency for VAT calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: KDV hesaplaması için yabancı parayı yerel paraya çeviren döviz kuru.

inputs.label: Domestic VAT Rate
inputs.businessContext: Your domestic VAT rate applicable to the received service.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your domestic VAT rate applicable to the received service.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alınan hizmete uygulanan yerel KDV oranı.

inputs.label: Cross-Border Transaction
inputs.businessContext: 1 if the service is from a foreign supplier, 0 if domestic reverse charge.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 if the service is from a foreign supplier, 0 if domestic reverse charge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hizmet yabancı bir tedarikçiden ise 1, yurt içi tersine KDV ise 0.
